name: hcportal_confirmAuthentication
description: Confirms a portal authentication request initiated by a QR code scan from the mobile app. The portal (browser) calls this SP after displaying a QR code. If the app has scanned it and inserted a matching WebPortalAuthenticationRequests record, the SP provisions a new HC.Device record with a shared secret and returns the user's profile along with the device credentials (obfuscated as iconDataBase64 and colorPaletteIndex). If no matching auth request exists, returns silently with no rowset.

parameters.name: deviceId
parameters.description: Auth: the service account's device ID for authenticating this portal polling call. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth.

parameters.name: newDeviceId
parameters.description: The device ID to provision for the new browser session. If NULL, auto-generated via NEWID().

parameters.name: accessToken
parameters.description: Auth: short-lived cryptographic token. Validated via HC6.ValidatePortalAuth with @qrCodeData as the paramString.

parameters.name: qrCodeData
parameters.description: The QR code payload to match against pending auth requests. Must be non-NULL and at least 10 characters (LEN check). Matched case-insensitively with TRIM(LOWER()). Also used as the paramString for auth token validation.

parameters.name: deviceInfo
parameters.description: JSON device info for the browser session. Stored in HC.Device.DeviceData when provisioning a new device.

rowsets.name: ErrorEnvelope
rowsets.description: Returned on any validation, auth, or runtime error. Short-circuits on first error.

rowsets.name: SuccessResult
rowsets.description: Returned when a matching WebPortalAuthenticationRequests record is found. Contains user profile and obfuscated device credentials. If no matching auth request exists, no rowset is returned at all (silent empty return — not an error).

columns.name: publicHasherId
columns.description: The authenticated user's public hasher ID (from HC.Hasher, not the service account passed as parameter)

columns.name: scanData
columns.description: The matched QR code scan data from HC.WebPortalAuthenticationRequests

columns.name: firstName
columns.description: User's first name. COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: lastName
columns.description: User's last name. COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: hashName
columns.description: User's hash name. COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: displayName
columns.description: User's display name (from HC.Hasher.DisplayName). COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: photo
columns.description: User's photo URL. COALESCE to empty string.

columns.name: iconDataBase64
columns.description: OBFUSCATED: contains the device shared secret (75-char base64 string). Used by the portal for subsequent token generation.

columns.name: colorPaletteIndex
columns.description: OBFUSCATED: contains the time window in seconds (30–45) for token validity.

sideEffects: INSERT into HC.Device when provisioning a new browser device (new shared secret and time window). Wrapped in a transaction.
breakingChangeRules: Never remove a column from any rowset
Never change a sentinel value meaning
